params.name: Travels of Marco Polo
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.12%), Wishing (0.11%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Club Value Pack II ($49.99)
params.description:
On Nov 2, AD 1298, traveler Marco Polo wrote this famous traveloge in prison.

This travelogue was dictated by Marco Polo and recorded and organized by Rustiqian. The book has a total of 220,000 words and is divided into 229 chapters. It's about many countries in Central Asia, West Asia, and Southeast Asia. The narrative center is about China. His footprints covered the North, Northwest, Southwest, and Eastern regions of China. It opened the Europeans' eyes, ignited Renaissance, and drove Europe …
